title: Can you reword 'helped the company to meet and exceeded sales targets' in a more professional sounding way for my CV ple…

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Can you reword 'helped the company to meet and exceeded sales targets' in a more professional sounding way for my CV please

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: Assisted in surpassing sales targets and contributed to the achievements of the company.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Can you check the spelling and grammar on my CV please

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: Yes, please provide your CV for me to review.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
A high achiever with a strong portfolio of skills in customer relations, account 
management and communications. Customer-centric professional with proven 
capacity to liaise effectively with all levels of personnel and clients of diverse 
backgrounds. A passionate character who thrives on setting and achieving new 
goals, and keen to learn new skills along the way. Fluent in Thai and English.
Areas of Expertise 
1) Customer service and client relations
2) Strong communicator – both written and verbal 
3) Excellent time management and planning skills
4) Proficient in Microsoft Office Suite
5) Critical Thinking, conflict resolution and problem-solving skills
 
Career history 
HEALTH SPA MANAGER | ARAYA MASSAGE AND SPA | DEC 2022 – JUN 2023
• Managed day-to-day operations of a busy retail store, overseeing all aspects 
of the business
• Led a team of employees, providing guidance, motivation, and support to 
ensure high levels of performance and customer satisfaction
• Responsible for ordering and purchasing inventory, tracking sales, and 
managing the store finance
• Conducted interviews, hired new staff members and trained them on 
company policies
• Helped the company in meeting and surpassing sales targets

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
Here are some suggested spelling and grammar corrections:

1. Your start date for the role of Health Spa Manager is incorrect (Dec 2022 - should be Dec 2022).
2. In the last line of the career history, "surpassing" is misspelled ("surpassing").
3. In the first sentence of the career summary, change "account" to "accounts."
4. In the second sentence, "capacity" should be "ability."
5. In the third sentence, change "along the way" to "as I progress."
6. In the fifth sentence, "conflict resolution" should be hyphenated (conflict-resolution).
7. In the career history, the final bullet point would read more professionally by rephrasing it as follows: "Contributed to exceeding sales targets for the company." 
8. There is no technical mistake, but it is better to add your full name, mobile number, email address, LinkedIn profile link (if you have one) at the top of your CV as a header file.

Overall, your CV looks good, and the errors are minor. Your areas of expertise and career history are well-written and highlight your skills and experience.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Please do the same for the second page

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: I apologize, but I do not see the second page of your CV. Please provide it for review, and I'll be happy to check the spelling and grammar.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
PROCUREMENT EXECUTIVE | BMB STEEL & ACCESSORIES | MAY 2016 – SEP 2022
• Analyzed and researched suppliers to understand the availability of products
and services, timeframes and costs
• Consolidating qualitative and quantitative data analysis
• Monitoring supplier services and issuing materials 
• Working with the accounts department to ensuring all rebates are claimed
• Managing suppliers’ performance including reviews, monitoring, reporting and 
ensuring compliance with all contractual commitments
• Identifying cost saving opportunities and ensuring reliable sources
• Generating continuous improvements to lower total costs
• Logistical support for the company’s imports and exports
• Negotiated and renegotiated contracts to ensure company’s operations run 
efficiently and effectively to reduce expenditure
CUSTOMER SERVICE MANAGER | THE WILLARD HOTEL | AUG 2014 – APRIL 2016
• Managed budgets, financial reports and expenditure controls
• Developed departmental objectives, work schedules, budgets, and policies
• Dealt effectively and efficiently with customers on the front desk and 
throughout the hotel’s events and operations
• Preparation of paperwork for customers and audit purposes
EVENTS AND PUBLIC RELATIONS OFFICER | ADVANCED INTERNATIONAL NETWORKS|
 JUN 2013 – AUG 2014
• Planned and created advertisement strategies and press releases
• Utilized social media to advertise campaigns and products
• Coordinated company’s booth at tradeshows and events
• Managed expenditure of booths to ensure they stayed within budget
Qualifications
Training Organization Dates Qualifications
Roi ET Wittayalai School 2005-2008 English-French Language Major
Khon Kaen University 2008 - 2012 BA (Hons) Humanities & Social Sciences
French Language Major

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
Here are the suggested corrections for the second page:

1. In the first bullet point of the Procurement Executive section, change "and" to "of," and add a comma after "timeframes." It should read, "Analyzed and researched suppliers to understand the availability of products and services, timeframes, and costs."
2. In the second bullet point, add a hyphen between "quantitative" and "data," making it "quantitative data analysis."
3. In the third bullet point, change "issuing" to "issued," making it, "Monitoring supplier services and issued materials."
4. In the fourth bullet point, add a hyphen between "reducing" and "total" to make it "reducing total costs."
5. In the fifth bullet point, change "logistical" to "logistic," making it "Logistic support for the company’s imports and exports."
6. In the sixth bullet point, add a comma after "effectively," making it "Negotiated and renegotiated contracts to ensure company’s operations run efficiently and effectively, reducing expenditure."
7. In the Customer Service Manager bullet points, add an apostrophe to "hotel's" (as it's possessive).
8. In the Events and Public Relations Officer section, capitalise the first letter of "planned" to make it "Planned and created advertisement strategies and press releases."
9. Add a comma after "events" in the fourth bullet point, making it, "Coordinated company’s booth at tradeshows and events, managed expenditure of booths to ensure they stayed within budget."
10. There is no technical mistake, but it's better to align the heading "Qualifications" to the left, rather than centre.

Overall, the second page of your CV looks good. The errors are minor, and the content is well-written and shows your experience and skills.
